subcodes.first_line: The effulgent lights of the Manifestation have encompassed the world, and the Speaker of Sinai doth warble, with most wondrous melodies, upon the Lote-Tree of meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انوار ظهور عالم را احاطه نموده و مکلم طور بر سدره معانی بابدع نغمات تغنی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
